Power BIDAX

Supermarket Sales Dashboard

Early Power BI sales dashboard with dynamic slicers, KPI cards, and multiple chart types.

Watch walkthrough

One of my first Power BI projects, analyzing supermarket sales with KPI cards (total sales, profit, top product/category), stacked columns, bar/pie/area/tree charts, and slicers for month, year, sales type, and payment mode.

Credit to Lean Excel Solutions for the original tutorial content.
